sections.paragraph:
ἀφιλοξενία, ας, ἡ(s. φιλέω, ξένος) inhospitality (SibOr 8, 304) 1 Cl 35:5.—DELG s.v. ξένος.

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 157
